item.title:
BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 20min Spieth doing the best Spieth pastiche you could imagine this week
2nd ATG in R1 1st PUT
item.description:
Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 20min Spieth doing the best Spieth pastiche you could imagine this week
2nd ATG in R1 1st PUTT in R2 1st APP in R3
Awful driving but wouldn’t shock me were he somehow 1st or 2nd OTT tomorrow 2 8 1 mil
